problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: Combining Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
